name: plugin install copies the detectors into rubric/detectors/_community/<plugin-id>/ at the architecture-named path
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example/detectors && printf 'name: example
rules: [{id: foo, detector: detectors/foo.sh}]
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && printf 'echo ok
' > stub-clones/acme/example/detectors/foo.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass 2>err.txt && [ -f rubric/detectors/_community/example/foo.sh ] && echo ok 1>&2
